race.comment: SHE OURS (2) resumes here but has only missed a drum once in four fresh attempts and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Can run a big race first-up. Former NSW galloper DYAMI (1) is having his first run for the new stable but will find this easier than what he faced below the border. Keep very safe. CHERRABAH (14) strips fitter second-up from the break and will get a cosy run in transit from the inside alley. Right in this contest. THE SOUR (15) is stepping out at this circuit for the first time. Last appeared when she finished fourth over 1000m at Sunshine Coast on May 10. Will strip fitter third-up and can give this a shake.
